name: Chile-Coated Grilled Summer Squash and Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Minced fresh chile pepper of your choice
2 tablespoons Comino seeds, or 1 tablespoon ground Cumin
2 medium Zucchini, cut length-wise into 1/2 inch planks
2 medium Summer squash, cut length-wise into 1/2 inch planks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the olive oil, minced garlic, and chopped chile pepper.
2. Add cumin seeds or ground cumin to the mixture.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Place zucchini and summer squash planks in the seasoned mixture.
5. Coat both sides evenly with the mixture.
6. Grill over medium heat until charred on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
